speaker: MATT
raw_text: Because your initiative was super high. That's totally my bad. It's early enough in the combat where it's not going to make a huge difference. But you do watch as they turn and they look past the direction like they're ready to dart towards the actual large carnival tent.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't want to be a guard killer. All right, fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't want to be a fucking zombie.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We just can't be here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I peek out and see the guard-zombies?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: They did run by.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch them as you peek under the tent and they both just ran to the right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I crawl out from under the tent and clear the gap with them and get up to them?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, fancy.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Cool map.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's as close as you can get right there. You can go into a dash if you wanted to engage directly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, man, I don't know what to do.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's all right. Work it out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Actually, this is my fault. I rolled for the zombies to see who they saw first, but technically their turn hadn't come up yet. That's my fault, because their initiative is lower in the order, so we're going to retcon a little bit of that. That's still there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Rewind!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, that ends your turn, Molly. It's going to take its first slam, swipe at you. Since you're immediately in front of it. That's a natural 20. I'm rolling some good 20s tonight.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, don't leave me!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (Counting) What's the movement on Frumpkin?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. That's your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ja, that's it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Molly, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to take two more shots, I'm going to see if I can decapitate--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Two more shots?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh man! I've got to get out of that habit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Two more swings?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Two more swings, see if I can decapitate it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Two more flourishes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's an eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Eight? Misses.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: But a 16 does not.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16 does hit. Go ahead and roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's nine points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nine points of damage. As the blade sinks into its shoulder and you see it carves in and jams halfway through the torso, the armor stopping it part way before it lodges in, and it leans forward. (growling) It's still standing, and your blade's stuck in the abdomen.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Renewed, undead strength.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, I'll say-- (sighs). He's still unconscious. Given a little bit of time, he'll come back to consciousness. Ten minutes or so. You can probably, eventually through the use of strong vapors or something you can bring him back from the brink. At this point the rest of the carnival currently within the vicinity begin to emerge from the tents seeing that the danger has passed.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm the cleric? What is this? I've never traveled with a bunch of people that I thought would die in front of me, okay? I never needed a healer's kit before.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, congratulations, you're the cleric now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (gasps) You have a healer's kit? Oh my gosh. I've always wanted one of these for so long.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll give it to her. Here, it's a gift. Congratulations-on-you-being-in-a-new group gift.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes! How do I use this, though?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh no, she's not proficient.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I open it and rummage through a bunch of shit here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No vanilla extract or sprinkles?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll say for the instance of this, since it's not necessarily immediate danger of him dying off. Go ahead and make a medicine check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Use my dice that I gave you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Should I?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What if I roll a one on it?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's what I'm hoping for.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's a strong four.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: A nine?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's pretty burned. The maroon robes on the one armor is damaged and can possibly be salvaged. The armor on the one that is burned can be used. The robes or the maroon cloth is burned away entirely. The armor looks like its been burned. It has blackened, charcoal edges to it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know who should run where.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (groans)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I have his head in my lap and I'm slapping his cheek consistently.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Was there nothing useful on the guard?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you continue to search through, aside from the armor that seems functional, each of them have a basic longsword.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: One of them has my sword embedded in their chest.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes. Which can be pulled out. Between the two of them you can gather about six gold pieces and four silver pieces.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ooh!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't want to get these folk in any more trouble. How far is it from here to the lake?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Glancing off to the side you can see the lake is maybe 400 to 500 feet north.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I say we could drag them and throw them into the lake to avoid suspicion on the carnival. We've got to get out of here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How well did the fire burn the other body? Did it do pretty well or--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It doesn't take you too long to get to the southern edge of the Ustaloch. You can see the muddy lake bed that gives way to the water itself. Number of scattered stones in the muck and occasionally you hear the lapping of waves. The very subtle wind flowing through in the night. It's about two in the morning. There's some moonlight in the sky. It looks like a waxing moon. At least the one you can see because there are multiple moons.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you blanked out there for a second.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: If we find them, then we assign Frumpkin to the case and I will lean against a tree. Nott will keep watch over me and we will know where it goes.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're going with them, then?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, let's follow the direction that the toad went.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Cats love toads.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I like it. It's a good plan. This is definitely not going to backfire. Let's go. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. The horses pick up and begin heading northward towards the Ustaloch.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: When we get far away from the carnival, we should drop the guard bodies off. Push them out so it looks like they were on patrol when they turned into zombies. Far away from the carnival.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We ran into those guards that were patrolling the lake--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Exactly! Like a lake patrol.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: This will break your short rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The toad went due north? Like straight into the water?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's the direction it was traveling.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I look for toad tracks?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a survival check, sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Come on, don't roll Sam's fucking dice.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I didn't.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, Sam.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That was a lot.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That was a whole lot of rolls. Survival. 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 11. It's hard to really make out what tracks are what. You do see a few heavy impacts in the mud. Some of them looks like it could have been the bodies being rolled, but not too far from where you are, there's one big smack in the mud. Like something heavy impacted.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fjord! Come look at this! This is definitely toad tracks.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: In the shape that it's in, this print. Are their toes pointing in a specific direction?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, this will break my short rest.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Actually, I'd say for the points of expediency, with the time it has taken you and have these discussion at the edge, it's pushing 2:30 like 3:00 in the morning and both of you have finished the short rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: If we're chasing the toad it seems like we need to find a boat and go out into the water.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So we head towards that boat that hit land.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Steal that boat?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: If we go towards the toad we are going to fight the toad.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well no, we are just going to find the toad. You said this. We're camping and waiting and resting.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The other thing we can do, but it will take some time, need about an hour. Frumpkin is a cat but Frumpkin does not need to be a cat. I could fly him over as well but I need time, I need about an hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Or swim.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm actively tracking this creature, aren't I on a certain level?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I mean, if you want to. You haven't yet decided to.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I hadn't really thought about it. It's something I can in theory do.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Because you used your blood on it?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No. This would also break my short rest, wouldn't it?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: By the time you guys make it back to the inn--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an animal handling check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You rolled shit, too!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Horses are our new door!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Drops a couple of horse apples.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I didn't get advantage on that because I knew the animals, did I?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. You knew the animals, but you weren't the animal handler.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I use Thaumaturgy and I make the sound of like a predator behind them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'll give you an animal handling check with advantage, because it's fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm into this.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, 13!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 13! It's above a ten, guys! Awesome!

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: (chanting) Level two!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is Romper Room!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I know! With a crack, and a heavy echoing snarling sound in the vicinity, both horses kick up and go into a full gallop sprint away from the direction of you, the cart being dragged behind it. They continue to go into the shadow. You don't know how long they're going to go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I cast Thaumaturgy! (quacks)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys complete a long rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wow, that was bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You have advantage, right? Roll again!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I already rolled once.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: 18, but I'm also--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Technically, my stealth would be 23.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, that's fine. You manage to make it to the Nestled Nook Inn without any prying eyes seeing too deeply into your movement. You get back to your rooms as the very faint distant change of black night begins to turn to the faintest of blue of morning curling over. You guys go to your respective rooms, and you take a rest?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We should go to sleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to dig some charcoal out of the remains of the fire in the common room and then go to bed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. The owner watches you do that and she's just, "Whatever."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't thank me. Lovely inn. Good night.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Don't get anything else dirty!"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Just going to draw some dicks!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "No. We came to tell you that you'll be needed for the investigation and questioning within the next three hours to arrive at the behest of the Lawmaster at the stockade."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, is there a rest button?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: There is, there are two rest buttons, Liam.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Where are they?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They're down towards the bottom, short rest or long rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Whoa!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I fell asleep in my sketchbook, halfway through my drawing of the two zombie guards making out.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Gross. Were they dead?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: They're zombies, so yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Slightly hotter, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: One arm is like off to the side.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Way hotter.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With full rests completed, consciousness comes to on the outside of Jester's room with the heavy sound of (knocking).

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Jester!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is that our door?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I think so.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hold on, I'm naked!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, hold on, she's naked! Do you want to get it? Or should I get it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll get it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe I should get it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, I get up, I get it. Hello!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You open the door. The same two crownsguard that had come the day before.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did you come back to play some games?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: (door creaking) Habit of creeping out guards, I like this. The rest of you come to consciousness. You're rested. At this point in time, it's past noon. It's about two in the afternoon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Jester!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is that our door?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I think so.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hold on, I'm naked!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, hold on, she's naked! Do you want to get it? Or should I get it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll get it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe I should get it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, I get up, I get it. Hello!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You open the door. The same two crownsguard that had come the day before.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did you come back to play some games?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No. We came to tell you that you'll be needed for the investigation and questioning within the next three hours to arrive at the behest of the Lawmaster at the stockade."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Why didn't you just come and get us when you were ready for us?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, you know, we might want to brush our teeth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Does that take you three hours?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No. Now we have time to--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We'll be back in three hours."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'll see you soon! I miss you already!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Sorry to disturb, the investigation will require you in about three hours."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Why didn't you just come and get us when you were ready for us?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, you know, we might want to brush our teeth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Does that take you three hours?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No. Now we have time to--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We'll be back in three hours."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'll see you soon! I miss you already!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (door creaking) Habit of creeping out guards, I like this. The rest of you come to consciousness. You're rested. At this point in time, it's past noon. It's about two in the afternoon.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No knock on our door, only you two.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, no. It's these two currently, for the moment. Then-- (knocking).

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Your jury summons is (groans).

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Just finishing up with them.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's two o'clock in the afternoon, you said? When we woke up?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We got back in the middle of the night. No real job here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll open the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Two guards are there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So it'll take you a few hours to go through those books.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure you don't want stay here and shop around some more? Okay!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No! We have plans to make with our new friends! Let's go get some breakfast!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, but I could've perused some of the aisles and it's a long-- okay!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Nope! We're away!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No hands in your pockets order.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys make your way back as the rest of you have come to consciousness and you head down to the tavern.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Cool. Why are you guys so happy?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Good shopping run. Where did you get 13 gold?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I've always had it, you never asked for any.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Good to know. I don't need to know anything more, I'm just happy that you have it. I'm thankful.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I collect things. Among them are pieces of gold. I have more.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I just squeeze the cheeks, and I look at my books!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh! You made my cheeks all green!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As you guys are having this discussion, the two guards that had come in earlier come through the main door earlier than the three hours you had anticipated with another guard in tow. As they rush in they glance around the room and see you and make a beeline to your table in a very huffed bit of energy. They say, "You are absolved of meeting this afternoon. We'll pick this up tomorrow."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Right, it's a kid's Encyclopedia Britannica, and scanning through, I saw one thing that popped out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you were like, wait.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: May I ask with my intelligence score of 18 and the Keen Mind feat, could we say that Caleb is a speed reader?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: In comparison to some, maybe. You're not Johnny Five-style, I know kung-fu.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Believably, not magic.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you can read pretty quick, let's say. You spend a lot of time by yourself reading.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: "Reading."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Good times.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: In the bathroom.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Clusters of semen all around you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It was still funny when it was just implied. You can paint it across the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Always funny. Always.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We're talking about masturbation.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Jerking off. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Would you say that Caleb is a speed-beater?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Roll for spanking.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From the window to the wall. (laughter and groaning)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As you concentrate, the bird's-eye view of Trostenwald-- Frumpkin carries up high into the air. For the large lake that it is, you can see two smaller land masses in the center of the lake. Technically not north from where you are now, since you're back in the city, it's more of a northeastern direction. They're both relatively small, one's maybe a few hundred feet across, another one is maybe 50 feet across. It's a smaller mass. Watching as it coasts downward and does a pass over the larger one, make a perception check for Frumpkin.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. As you go up to the window and release Frumpkin--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can we say we're doing this from one of our rooms?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We gather in Fjord and Molly's room.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's curious, when Caleb is focusing, the pupils go to a very faint sky blue. You see flickering in them, though you cannot make any imagery out of it, it's just the strange movement within the pupil.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yep, there's that bullshit again.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He can't communicate with us when he's like this?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He talks. He will talk to you out of the fucking blue.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can he feel if we touch him? I poke him in the forehead.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ow.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't do that, please, I'm trying to concentrate.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can he tell who did it?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, he can't see you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's wonderful.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But I will tell him later when he asks.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, okay, but he won't know now.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. It requires half a day to make that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Worse. Five.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The other one has maybe five or six trees on it, but most of them appear to have either died or be standing alone on this small mass. That one looks pretty barren. Even with as bad of a look as that was, it doesn't look like there's anything visible on that land mass.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Does it look balder than the other?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It does.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The larger one has much more of a cluster, a grove.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Last question, I can probably tell how far apart these two islands are, yeah?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, they're roughly 600 feet apart from each other.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 600, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're all sitting around in this room, watching him watch TV, essentially.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, basically.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: While this is going on, can I whip out my little chemistry kit and start putting together some chemical stuff?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure, what would you like to make?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Acid.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: By now it's 3 30 in the afternoon, four o'clock.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did you have it fly down closer so you could see better?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I thought that he would be able to see from the air, and I thought that would be safer, so no, I'm sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Was it busy water, was there lots of ships out?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I would have seen that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There are some fishing vessels out there, and there are a number of them that are still at the docks.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's not a lull for any reason?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's not fleet week.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I guess we should go to the big island?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I think that the chances of finding it on the big island are greater, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fair enough. Out the window, shall we?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What time of day is it?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Sure. Easy enough. The sun is close to setting. you've got about another 30 minutes or so before it sets.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think he is a fiend. I think he is feeding off her. The rest of it I'm not sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You never noticed Toya acting weird? You were never like, "Oh, this is a strange--"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Have you met us? We're all a bit weird, and you don't ask a ton of questions.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but there's a difference between "quirky" weird and "Oh, I think this person's life force is being siphoned away from them" weird.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There is. It's the difference between being in a carnival and not being in a carnival.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Then why were you with the carnival?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Because I'm weird!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (groaning)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That tracks. That fully tracks.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I mean, it's putting together. He was never that talkative. I don't know. I don't like it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, what are we doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Let's go find the damn toad!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I use Mask of Many Faces to change into that older gray-haired farmer?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You all manage to slowly make your way to the outskirts of the Ustaloch, down to where the majority of the docks are set up on the lake itself. Since the lights have gone out, most of the boats have now come back in, and they are bringing in their hauls out, and have small nets and baskets filled with fish they've caught while they're out there, small crustaceans, most of them are in the process of just offloading and locking up and tying their boats. What are you guys doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I have my hood up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, no, I'm over cloak.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Weekend at Bernie's walking. Looking around at nothing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guide for two and a half blocks and the guard's still like, "Where is it?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I look over my shoulder and keep running, and then go: Oh, what do you want? Who are you? Why are you following me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You called me-- You said there was one of them--"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Have I done something again? Have you seen my son? What's your name? You're a strong looking--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He sheathes the blade.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh dear. Do you have any coin?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's badass.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He walks up and slaps you across the top of the head, and just goes, "Don't go wasting our time."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry. No respect for the elderly, apparently. I walk away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He spits on the ground towards you and turns around and heads back to his post.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (grunting) I make my way towards the docks.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Crookedstone used to be where and old witch lived about a hundred years ago." (gasps)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Caleb, where are we headed?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, are you still in bird mode?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No. That ended. We hear that there's beautiful islands out in the middle of the Ustaloch.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As he pulls the rest of the rope in as you guys are on board, he stops. "Beautiful?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: They haven't been on the water much. An island to the eyes of someone like him would appear--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I've never seen a lake before this one so, first island. It's a very big moment for me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He goes and gets his paddle out and begins making his way-- "Well there's only two islands out there. One's a piece of shite and the other's Crookedstone."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What's Crookedstone?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "I don't know. Probably died many years ago and no one goes around, seeing as it's cursed land. You'll see for yourself soon enough."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What's Crookedstone?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Crookedstone used to be where and old witch lived about a hundred years ago." (gasps)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No one goes over to Crookedstone."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No one goes to Crookedstone.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That is our siren's call.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Did you say piece of shite? What's the name of the other one?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, it doesn't really have a name. It's too small."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, so the big one is Crookedstone?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Crookedstone, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Can I ask you where you're going?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, that sounds like fun, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you guys aren't actually afraid of some--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He puts the oar down--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Boink.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (cork removal noise) (gulps) (sighs)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No aerator? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You monster! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You've ruined it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Fair be it to me to judge. To Crookedstone, then." He picks up his oar and begins paddling.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Tell me more about this witch!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You don't see any more crab shells, but you do glance a bit ahead, and amongst the trees, you can see stonework. Stones stacked in a wall that is toppled over and fallen. A small ruin. Some sort of a structure, once a single-story structure that seems to have fallen inward and been destroyed. Partially overgrown, and what little moonlight comes through, you can make out the shape of it. There's corners still standing, but other than that, it looks like it's been toppled over and left to ruin.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Stop burping! Yes you did!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I didn't burp!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You probably just breathed out hard.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry, it was me.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That was you?!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I meant Caleb's stink.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I have not burped.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm trying to keep an eye out for anything.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Unfortunately, you're having a hard time to make out any sign. You guys make your way towards the center of this cluster of trees.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: As we walk, Fjord and I will keep a lookout for any more crustacean empty shells.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Make a perception check. Well, one of you do, the other can aid if you want to, and that gives you advantage on the roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Help me. I get advantage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Thank god you're helping me. Just perception? 20 total.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 25 to 20, anybody? Nott, since you got high-- You got higher than that last time. 20 to 15?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Look at this well-constructed map.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, shit snacks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's Beau, right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Look at the size of that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Look, you're up in the air, bro!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And little Toya.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Whereabouts are you guys, currently?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I would be the furthest back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fjord's right next to me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Me and Molly were closer to it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Fjord's right there, giving you the boost up. You and Molly were close to it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Closer than Caleb. Yeah, that's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys are next to each other, because you're holding there. Molly moved up to probably here. Around there?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm all right with that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, I'm good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The trees are awesome. Oh man! That fucking music.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Let's go ahead and-- oh shit, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no, they rolled really well.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They? It's just one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Toya's there too.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Toya's just a dwarf girl.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: She's going to pull out some shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah she is, don't trust that bitch.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It is now Kylre's turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sick.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can only apply one per round on a bonus action.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Action, bonus action.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you're doing both right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Action and bonus action.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Technically it's a bonus action; you can't convert an action to a bonus action.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I can't turn an action to a bonus action?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. Unfortunately.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All right, that's fair.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you could apply it once, and then you still have your action if you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can mark down, you take down your temporary hit points or your max hit points to 22.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to move around and I'm going to try and get a little cover right here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You move there?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to move there, and I'm going to hold my attack until there's something to hit. I'm going to try and make a little wave at Yasha. Toya. Ah, brain.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. That ends your turn. It is now Kylre's turn who is-- (laughs) oh man, yeah. He was about to go right after Beau, but he's scared of you and cannot move closer towards you. He's going to take a swing at Nott. He's like (panicked muttering) and try to squash the small thing right there, with disadvantage. That is 16.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Are you a bard?! What the fuck?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Variant tiefling.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I have to learn some-- Yeah, that's a--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A wisdom saving throw?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's a wisdom saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is going to be a no with a seven, I'm pretty sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm trying to figure out how this works but--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: By the way, when Caleb went down those four balls of light disappeared.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's not a lot, but that's four points of psychic damage and he has disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty, good to know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That was just my bonus action, I'm going to use my action--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Vicious Mockery is an action.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No that's a-- it is an action, you're right. That's what I've got right now. Just trying to get its attention.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I will say for the purposes of this, you watch as Nott pulls the porcelain mask back and just gives Caleb the most terrifying mouth-to-mouth you've ever seen. Caleb, the darkness fades and you come to consciousness. The first things you notice are the cold temperature, the taste of iron in your mouth, and the vision of Nott pulling away from you like a terrifying Nosferatu.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: With advantage, right? That hits. 15, natural. With my two-handed staff?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait. I've already hit. Forget that. Forget that! Eight, so 12 damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so the first attack crushes the imp and it hits the ground, the wings go limp and it's dead, but you still (yells) and stomp down, just crushing it more and more. And then its body eventually just burns away into ash. So all the threats have been neutralised and you now have two friends that are bleeding out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, then I'm going to run over to Fjord and cast Cure Wounds on him so he wakes up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You come back to consciousness.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: With five hit points.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will try to stabilise Caleb using no--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Caleb, I need you to make a death save.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Death save? Fail.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. Make a medicine check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20. And I will do mouth-to-mouth.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You would be at one hit point when you come to consciousness. I'm giving you that because of the natural 20. Any other roll, you would just be stabilised.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch as two Jesters start doing a little skip.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I immediately run to Toya.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I was about to say, I'm going to run to Toya and pick her up. I've got her. I've got her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you-- I've got her. I could hold her, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I've got her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Why--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Because you were the last face she saw? I should probably be the first. Thank you. You did the right thing. You don't need to be the first thing she sees. She'll just start screaming all over again. Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Anything of the toad?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're going to need him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah. I want to go over and start searching his body.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I thought it burned away, no?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A large part of the torso just burned away. The inside is partially burned out to embers in the blast, but there's still probably 60 percent of the body remaining.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: DM, am I at one hit point at this moment? It was zero.
